heading: Sunday Night
text: Scattered rain or snow drying out early leading to partial clearing mainly south and east, lingering flurries north. Lows in the 20s to low 30 in the broad valleys west and south. Northwest wind 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Monday
text: Variable clouds and sun. A few early morning scattered snow showers over the western Greens. Highs in the mid 30s to near 40 north, in the low to mid 40s south. Northwest wind 5 to 10 mph, decreasing in the afternoon.

heading: Monday Night
text: Becoming mostly clear and cold. Lows in the 20s, dropping into the upper teens in the cold spots north and west. Light northwest winds becoming calm.
